subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon dropped to near 1 hit point.
source_quote: Dropped to near 1 hit point

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds on Zenvon.
source_quote: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon was healed to full health with 16 HP including temporary HP.
source_quote: healing Zenvon to full (16 HP including temp HP)

subject: flood trigger
fact: Goblins released a dam, triggering a flood that swept through the cave.
source_quote: A flood triggered by goblins releasing a dam swept through the cave

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw against the flood.
source_quote: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra was caught in the flood.
source_quote: was caught in the flood

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon rolled a 19 on sleight of hand.
source_quote: Rolled a 19 on sleight of hand

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon grabbed Veyra before she was swept away.
source_quote: to grab Veyra before she was swept away

subject: goblins
fact: All goblins at the cave entrance were defeated.
source_quote: All goblins and wolves at the cave entrance were defeated

subject: wolves
fact: All wolves at the cave entrance were defeated.
source_quote: All goblins and wolves at the cave entrance were defeated

subject: cave advance
fact: The party proceeded deeper into the cave.
source_quote: the party proceeded deeper into the cave

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon used deception with a roll of 15 to imitate a goblin voice.
source_quote: Used deception (rolled 15) to imitate a goblin voice

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon lured a goblin closer for a surprise attack.
source_quote: luring one goblin closer for a surprise attack

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin.
source_quote: Rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's stealth roll allowed the kill to go unnoticed.
source_quote: allowing the kill to go unnoticed

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg the bugbear appeared and engaged the party.
source_quote: Klarg the bugbear appeared and engaged the party

subject: Pip
fact: Pip took significant damage.
source_quote: Pip and Sister Maela took significant damage

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela took significant damage.
source_quote: Pip and Sister Maela took significant damage

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg.
source_quote: Used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt for 7 points of damage.
source_quote: killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt (7 points of damage)

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra prevented the goblin from escaping and alerting others.
source_quote: before it could escape and alert others

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon landed the killing blow on Klarg.
source_quote: Landed the killing blow on Klarg

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon used Nick scimitar and dagger combo to deal 8 points of damage to Klarg.
source_quote: using Nick scimitar + dagger combo for 8 points of damage

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg had 5 HP remaining when struck by the killing blow.
source_quote: (Klarg had 5 HP remaining)

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves.
source_quote: successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela subdued the wolves rather than killing them.
source_quote: rather than killing them

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg was killed.
source_quote: Klarg was killed

subject: goblins
fact: All goblins in the main cavern were neutralized.
source_quote: all goblins and wolves in the main cavern were neutralized

subject: wolves
fact: All wolves in the main cavern were neutralized.
source_quote: all goblins and wolves in the main cavern were neutralized

subject: Cragmaw Hideout
fact: The Cragmaw Hideout was cleared.
source_quote: the Cragmaw Hideout was cleared

subject: sacks and crates
fact: Sacks and crates were marked with a blue lion.
source_quote: sacks and crates marked with a blue lion

subject: Lionshield Coster
fact: The blue lion is the symbol of the Lionshield Coster merchant company from Phandalin.
source_quote: the symbol of the Lionshield Coster merchant company from Phandalin

subject: copper pieces
fact: The party found 1,700 copper pieces.
source_quote: found 1,700 copper pieces

subject: potions of healing
fact: The party found two potions of healing.
source_quote: two potions of healing

subject: jade statuette
fact: The party found a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes.
source_quote: a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes

subject: merchant provisions
fact: The merchant provisions could potentially be returned to the Lionshield Coster for a reward.
source_quote: the merchant provisions could potentially be returned to the Lionshield Coster for a reward

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head present during the ambush on the Triboar Trail.
source_quote: Mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head who was present during the ambush on the Triboar Trail

subject: strange goblin
fact: The strange goblin whispered, "You're not what Ruxithid wants."
source_quote: The goblin whispered, "You're not what Ruxithid wants"

subject: goblin phrase
fact: Neither Sildar nor the party could interpret the phrase "You're not what Ruxithid wants."
source_quote: a phrase neither Sildar nor the party could interpret

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter or Phandalin.
source_quote: Offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter or Phandalin

subject: elongated-headed goblin
fact: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin remains unexplained.
source_quote: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin and the phrase "You're not what Ruxithid wants" remain unexplained

subject: goblin phrase meaning
fact: The meaning of the phrase "You're not what Ruxithid wants" remains unexplained.
source_quote: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin and the phrase "You're not what Ruxithid wants" remain unexplained

subject: escort agreement
fact: The party agreed to escort Sildar.
source_quote: The party agreed to escort Sildar

subject: travel to Phandalin
fact: The party headed to Phandalin for a long rest.
source_quote: headed to Phandalin for a long rest

subject: Gundren's location
fact: The party still does not know where Gundren was taken after the ambush.
source_quote: The party still does not know where Gundren was taken after the ambush

subject: Black Spider
fact: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown.
source_quote: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown
